rationale: Clear, well-organized, and highly practical. The phased structure, sample questions, timelines, and concrete outreach/logistics details make it easy to follow and act on. It is slightly long and occasionally uses more polished or strategic phrasing than strictly necessary, but it stays focused and useful throughout.
